notes: Section 131, , , provided for establishment of a leprosy home in the United States.act Feb. 3, 1917, ch. 26, § 139 Stat. 872

Section 135, , , provided for additional pay of officers detailed to duty at said home. See .act Feb. 3, 1917, ch. 26, § 539 Stat. 873section 210 of this title
